title: Italian ATECO 2007 Dataset Entry
description: Schema for a single ATECO 2007 (Italian economic activity classification) entry enriched with workplace-safety metadata per D.Lgs 81/08 and Accordo Stato-Regioni 21/12/2011.

codice.title: Codice ATECO 2007
codice.description: ATECO 2007 code in the standard ISTAT format (e.g., '10.71.10', '47.11.10'). May include subcategory digits.

slug.title: URL-safe slug
slug.description: Lowercase, hyphen-separated identifier suitable for URLs and filenames.

settore.title: Settore (sector name)
settore.description: Human-readable Italian sector or activity name corresponding to the ATECO code.

rischioAteco.title: Livello di rischio
rischioAteco.description: Workplace-safety risk classification per Accordo Stato-Regioni 21/12/2011 (Allegato II, Tabella 1).

corsiObbligatori.title: Corsi formativi obbligatori
corsiObbligatori.description: Mandatory training courses applicable to workers in this ATECO sector under D.Lgs 81/08.

nome.description: Course name (e.g., 'Formazione generale lavoratori', 'RSPP Datore di Lavoro Rischio Alto').

durataOre.description: Duration in hours of the training course.

validitaAnni.description: Validity period of the certification in years before refresher training is required.

riferimentoNormativo.description: Legal reference for the training requirement (e.g., 'Accordo Stato-Regioni 21/12/2011').

leggiApplicabili.title: Leggi applicabili
leggiApplicabili.description: List of Italian laws, decrees, or regulations applicable to this ATECO sector.

titolo.description: Title or short description of the legal instrument.

articoli.description: Specific article numbers within the referenced law.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Search keywords associated with this sector entry.

descrizione.title: Descrizione estesa
descrizione.description: Extended description of the sector and its workplace-safety implications.

descrizioneBreve.title: Descrizione breve
descrizioneBreve.description: Short one-line summary of the sector.
